title: O*NET Web Services API reference seed
license_status: license agreement; API key required; commercial use allowed per reference table
text: O*NET Web Services can provide occupation and skill taxonomy data through registered GET requests that return JSON. In this project it is used for skill normalization, not as a live employer JD source.

title: ChEMBL release and download seed
text: ChEMBL provides structured database downloads including SQL and chemical file formats. This project uses small sampled activity records for evidence extraction and metadata tracking.

title: PMC OA license policy seed
license_status: license varies per article; use only allowed retrieval services
text: PMC Open Access Subset articles are reusable only according to article-level licenses. The project stores license metadata and avoids treating all PMC content as text-mining eligible.

title: SEC EDGAR public filing API seed
license_status: public filings; respect fair access and User-Agent requirements
text: SEC data APIs expose public filing history and XBRL company facts in JSON. This project uses SEC filings as enterprise public-document examples, not as financial advice.

title: Synthetic SOP for evidence triage workflow
text: When an analyst submits a question, the system must retrieve source-backed evidence, attach citation metadata, mark unsupported claims, and route uncertain cases for human review.
